message:
fix: update ArrayList to ArrayListUnmanaged for Zig 0.15 compatibility

Zig 0.15 changed the ArrayList API - ArrayList no longer has an init()
method. Use ArrayListUnmanaged which requires passing the allocator to
each method call instead.

Files updated:
- src/python.zig: tracked_strings HashMap values
- src/query/expr.zig: collectColumns helper
- src/sql/executor.zig: groups, key_strings, result_columns
- src/logic_table/logic_table.zig: listTables
- src/encoding/writer.zig: PlainEncoder, ProtobufEncoder, LanceWriter
- src/format/parquet_file.zig: test file_data buffer
